parsed.production_notes: Combines live-action kitchen footage with an AI-generated robot avatar. The robot exhibits uncanny, synthetic facial movements and lip-syncing typical of AI, and the split-screen interaction is clearly composited.

characters.appearance: Middle-aged male, medium build, light brown complexion, dark beard. Friendly and expressive.
characters.wardrobe: Black t-shirt and a brown flat cap.

characters.appearance: Young adult male, slim build, light brown complexion, curly dark hair.
characters.wardrobe: Black t-shirt with a small red logo.

characters.appearance: White synthetic humanoid robot face with blue eyes.
characters.wardrobe: Traditional Saudi red and white checkered keffiyeh and black agal.

scenes.setting: Commercial kitchen, daytime, stainless steel equipment, warm lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A and Character B stand in a commercial kitchen, holding a massive metal pot of rice and meat over a large round tray. Character A is on the left, and Character B is on the right. Stainless steel counters and stoves fill the background. They look at each other and converse. At the end of the scene, they tip the pot, dumping the food onto the tray.

scenes.visual_description: Two cooks in a busy kitchen hold a giant pot of food, conversing with each other. Arabic subtitles appear on screen. The static camera captures them from the waist up before they pour the food onto a serving tray.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: كيف نقول انا اقدر بالانجليزي؟ [How do we say "I can" in English?]
Character A says: I can.
Character B says: انا ابي؟ [I want?]
Character A says: I want.
Character B says: انا عندي؟ [I have?]
Character A says: I have.
Character B says: يعني انت تقول لي انك بديت تتكلم انجليزي من ثلاث شهور بس وما كنت تعرف ولا كلمة صح؟ [So you're telling me you started speaking English just three months ago and you didn't know a single word, right?]
Character A says: Yeah, three months ago I started on my own. The only English I'd ever heard was from TikTok and now I'm speaking like a native.
Character B says: شوف السر انك تتكلم انجليزي بطلاقة انك تبدأ تتكلم من اول يوم وانا كان عندي احسن معلم ممكن. [Look, the secret to speaking English fluently is to start speaking from day one, and I had the best teacher possible.]
Character A says: تطبيق اسمه Learna. تعال خلني اوريك. [An app called Learna. Come let me show you.]
scenes.on_screen_text: كيف نقول انا اقدر بالانجليزي؟ (How do we say I can in English?) I can. انا ابي؟ (I want?) I want. انا عندي؟ (I have?) I have. يعني انت تقول لي انك بديت تتكلم انجليزي من ثلاث شهور بس وما كنت تعرف ولا كلمة صح؟ (So you're telling me you started speaking English just three months ago and you didn't know a single word, right?) أيوة، من ثلاث شهور بديت لحالي. (Yes, three months ago I started on my own.) الإنجليزي الوحيد اللي سمعته كان من تيك توك (The only English I had ever heard was from TikTok) والحين أتكلم كأني من أهلها. (And now I speak like a native.) شوف السر انك تتكلم انجليزي بطلاقة انك تبدأ تتكلم من اول يوم وانا كان عندي احسن معلم ممكن (Look, the secret to speaking English fluently is to start speaking from day one and I had the best teacher possible) تطبيق اسمه Learna. تعال خلني اوريك. (An app called Learna. Come let me show you.) Learna AI

panels.panel_visual_description: Character C faces the camera in the foreground. The background is a blurred, warm-toned interior. Behind Character C, various smartphones appear and disappear, displaying different application screens.

scenes.visual_description: An AI robot avatar wearing traditional Saudi headwear speaks to the camera. Behind it, smartphone screens display the Learna app interface. Arabic subtitles overlay the bottom.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character C says: هلا والله. تدري إنك تقدر تكلم إنجليزي مثل الأجانب في 1 أسبوع بس! بس هذا مزح. هاب Learna أبلكيشن يصحح لك وين تتسولف ويعلمك بدون ما تحس أصلاً. يلا خلونا نجرب هو سوا. [Welcome. Did you know you can speak English like foreigners in just 1 week! But this is a joke. This Learna application corrects you while you chat and teaches you without you even noticing. Come on, let's try it together.]
scenes.on_screen_text: هلا والله. (Welcome.) تدري إنك تقدر (Did you know you can) تكلم إنجليزي (speak English) مثل الأجانب في (like foreigners in) 1 أسبوع بس! (just 1 week!) بس هذا مزح. (But this is a joke.) هاب Learna أبلكيشن (This Learna application) يصحح لك وين تتسولف (corrects you while you chat) ويعلمك بدون (and teaches you without) ما تحس أصلاً. (you even noticing.) يلا خلونا نجرب (Come on, let's try) هو سوا. (it together.) Learna AI

scenes.setting: Top: Abstract dark background. Bottom: Commercial kitchen.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character C faces the camera. The background is dark with faint, concentric white circular lines resembling sound waves.
Character B stands in a commercial kitchen, looking directly forward. Stainless steel equipment is visible behind him.

scenes.visual_description: The screen is split horizontally. The top shows the AI robot avatar against a dark background. The bottom shows the younger cook in the kitchen. They converse, with Arabic subtitles across the center.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character C says: تتكلم إنجليزي؟ [Do you speak English?]
Character B says: شوي. [A little.]
Character C says: من وين إنت؟ Where are you from? [Where are you from? Where are you from?]
Character B says: I am Saudi Arabia.
Character C says: قربت. الأحسن تقول I am from Saudi Arabia. [Close. It's better to say I am from Saudi Arabia.]
Character B says: آخ، دايم أتلخبط فيها. [Ugh, I always get confused with that.]
Character C says: عشان كذا أنا موجود أساعدك تتكلم صح. [That's why I'm here to help you speak correctly.]
Character B says: بس ما عندي فلوس. [But I don't have money.]
Character C says: إيش؟ ما تحتاج فلوس. مع Learna تقدر تتمرن إنجليزي ببلاش. مو زي باقي التطبيقات أو الكورسات الغالية. [What? You don't need money. With Learna you can practice English for free. Not like other expensive apps or courses.]
Character B says: من جدك؟ [Are you serious?]
Character C says: أكيد. مافي حركات. بس ممارسة محادثة إنجليزي من جد مع مدرس AI. [Sure. No tricks. Just real English conversation practice with an AI teacher.]
Character B says: يعني... مدرس من جد؟ [You mean... a real teacher?]
Character C says: إيه. يصحح لك القرامر والنطق ويخليك تتكلم بثقة. [Yes. Corrects your grammar and pronunciation and makes you speak with confidence.]
Character B says: اوكي، أجل بحمل Learna الحين. [Okay, then I'll download Learna now.]
Character C says: كفو! خلنا نتكلم إنجليزي سوا. [Awesome! Let's speak English together.]
scenes.on_screen_text: تتكلم إنجليزي؟ (Do you speak English?) شوي. (A little.) من وين إنت؟ (Where are you from?) Where are you from? I am Saudi Arabia. قربت. الأحسن تقول (Close. It's better to say) I am from Saudi Arabia. آخ، دايم أتلخبط فيها. (Ugh, I always get confused with that.) عشان كذا أنا موجود (That's why I'm here) أساعدك تتكلم صح. (to help you speak correctly.) بس ما عندي فلوس. (But I don't have money.) إيش؟ ما تحتاج فلوس. (What? You don't need money.) مع Learna تقدر تتمرن (With Learna you can practice) إنجليزي ببلاش. (English for free.) مو زي باقي التطبيقات أو (Not like other apps or) الكورسات الغالية. (expensive courses.) من جدك؟ (Are you serious?) أكيد. مافي حركات. (Sure. No tricks.) بس ممارسة محادثة (Just conversation practice) إنجليزي من جد مع (real English with) مدرس AI. (AI teacher.) يعني... مدرس من جد؟ (You mean... a real teacher?) إيه. يصحح لك القرامر والنطق (Yes. Corrects your grammar and pronunciation) ويخليك تتكلم بثقة. (and makes you speak with confidence.) اوكي، أجل بحمل Learna الحين. (Okay, then I'll download Learna now.) كفو! خلنا نتكلم إنجليزي سوا. (Awesome! Let's speak English together.) Learna AI

panels.panel_visual_description: A solid dark blue background. In the center is a square icon with rounded corners, displaying the face of a white humanoid robot.

scenes.visual_description: A static end card with a solid blue background. The Learna app icon is centered, along with download text and app store badges.
scenes.on_screen_text: تحميل الآن! (Download now!) ابدأ بالتدرب (Start practicing) Learna App Store Google Play
